summary: Dedicated educator with expertise in Computer Science, Physics, and ICT integration. Passionate about transforming education in Rwanda through innovative technology. Teacher at Rukara Model School of Sciences and Mathematics, pursuing Bachelor's degree in Computer Science and Physics Education at ULK Gisenyi Campus. Certified ICT trainer empowering 100+ teachers with digital literacy through PISQUARE/Edify partnership. Strong background in web development, educational technology, and pedagogical innovation.
mission: Transform education in Rwanda through innovative technology integration, empowering both teachers and students with the digital skills needed for a brighter future.
